product.name: Executive L-Shaped Desk
product.description: Premium L-shaped desk with built-in storage and cable management.

product.name: Adjustable Standing Desk
product.description: Height-adjustable desk for ergonomic working positions.

product.name: Luxe Executive Chair
product.description: Premium ergonomic office chair with full adjustability and lumbar support.

product.name: Mesh Task Chair
product.description: Breathable mesh chair with essential adjustment features.

product.name: Modern File Cabinet
product.description: Contemporary file cabinet with locking drawers.

product.name: Royal Suite Bed
product.description: Luxury hotel bed with premium headboard and frame.

product.name: Standard Queen Bed
product.description: Reliable and comfortable queen bed for standard rooms.

product.name: Guest Lounge Chair
product.description: Comfortable accent chair for hotel room seating.

product.name: Modern Bedside Table
product.description: Sleek nightstand with drawer and shelf.

product.name: Luxury Patio Sofa Set
product.description: Weather-resistant outdoor sofa set with coffee table.

product.name: Premium Adirondack Chair
product.description: Classic outdoor chair made from weather-resistant materials.

product.name: Teak Dining Set
product.description: 6-person outdoor dining table and chairs made from premium teak.

product.name: Elegance Dining Set
product.description: Sophisticated dining table and chairs for upscale restaurants.

product.name: Upholstered Dining Chair
product.description: Comfortable dining chair with premium upholstery.

product.name: Modern Reception Desk
product.description: Contemporary front desk solution with integrated lighting.

product.name: Contemporary Lobby Sofa
product.description: Stylish and durable sofa for high-traffic areas.
